intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2 (Mexican Mint) are not identifiable as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) and P4 (Silver Guest) are absent or indistinguishable from soil debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in shared black pot.

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot containing dark, damp substrate.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot containing dark, damp substrate.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit figurine present; no plant matter visible.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot; no plant matter visible.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of surface cracking.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (likely a sensor or bottle) in the later images; presence of white granular material (possibly perlite or mineral deposits) in the P3 pot area.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Minimal change; pots remain empty of visible vegetation.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-3: Introduction of a metallic spoon-like object near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: Removal of the spoon; continued absence of plant life.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (sensor/bottle) adjacent to the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Static state; no further changes observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently devoid of the registered plant life. The environment appears to be a controlled setup for monitoring, but the biological components (P1-P4) have suffered total systemic loss or were never established.
anomalies: Introduction of external hardware (sensor/bottle) at T-1.
Presence of white granular debris in P3 pot.
Absence of all registered botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a series of empty containers. Despite the registry, there is no evidence of P1, P2, P3, or P4. The environment is stable but biologically inactive. The presence of a white rabbit figurine in P3 serves as a scale anchor, but the Pothos is missing. The recent introduction of a cylindrical object suggests an ongoing technical monitoring phase rather than an active botanical cultivation.
